data.narrative:
Arena AI is a Series B defense and security company founded by Pratap Ranade and Engin Ural that has raised $62M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comparison universe of 10 peers—2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms operating in the same sector and stage, including Dream Security, Harmattan AI, Code Metal, Castelion, and Defense Unicorns.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis, using total raised as a proxy base, applies a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B advancement, yielding an implied valuation of $118M. The peer-median approach examines 7 same-sector, same-stage comparables with a median valuation of $1.0B and a range spanning $300M to $3.0B. This method yields an implied valuation of $1.0B.

The two methods produce a wide range reflecting material dispersion in the peer set. The triangulated valuation range is $100M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $559M. Key uncertainties driving this spread include Arena AI's relative position on technology maturity and customer traction within a heterogeneous peer group, and whether current-stage comps appropriately reflect company-specific risk and growth profile. Narrowing this range would require additional data on revenue, growth rate, and customer concentration.
